patch.value:
GitHub: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/453

## Problem
`pm plan materialize --json` returns materialized[] entries with only `id`; title/type/parent are undefined in the response projection (data on disk is correct). Callers need a pm get round trip per created item to confirm.

## Proposed fix
Include { id, title, type, parent, tags } per materialized entry — same compact projection list rows use.

## Definition of done
materialize --json response carries the confirmation fields; spec updated; no extra reads needed to verify materialization.
GH-453: plan materialize --json response omits title/type/parent on materialized entries
Dogfood GH-453: materialize response projection returns only id per created item though disk data is complete. Duplicate check: searched materialize projection — no existing item.
materialize --json materialized[] entries include id/title/type/parent/tags; spec updated; no extra get round-trip needed for confirmation
